description: Grant browser permissions. Returns: 'granted {N} permission(s)'. Valid permission names: 'notifications', 'geolocation', 'videoCapture', 'audioCapture', 'midi', 'clipboardRead', 'clipboardWrite', 'persistentStorage', 'backgroundSync', 'paymentHandler'. Unknown/typo'd names are silently ignored. Example: {"permissions": ["notifications", "geolocation"]}
name: web_grant_permission

permissions.description: Array of permission names. Valid: notifications, geolocation, videoCapture, audioCapture, midi, clipboardRead, clipboardWrite, persistentStorage, backgroundSync, paymentHandler. Unknown names silently ignored.
